opinion.h1: LISBON SALESBOOK CO. v. OHIO, 379 U.S. 673 (1965)
opinion.h4: LISBON SALESBOOK CO. ET AL. v. OHIO. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF OHIO. No. 698. Decided January 25, 1965.
opinion.p: Isadore Topper, R. Brooke Alloway and N. Victor Goodman for appellants.
The appeal is dismissed for want of jurisdiction. Treating the papers whereon the appeal was taken as a petition for a writ of certiorari, certiorari is denied.
